docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $7,500.00 FILED BY OESTERGAARD, ADAM AS TO DEFENDANT TRINITY PROPERTIES DBA TRINITY MANAGEMENT SERVICES ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR MAR-15-2010 AT 06:30 PM IN DEPT 506
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED FEB-22-2010, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT TRINITY PROPERTIES DBA TRINITY MANAGEMENT SERVICES

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF MAR-15-2010 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF MAR-15-2010 BY PAUL SLAVIT. APPEARANCE BY PLAINTIFF AND DEFENDANT. PLAINTIFF AND DEFENDANT EXHIBITS RETAINED. CLERK: S. VANTREE. NOT REPORTED. (506)
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF MAR-15-2010 - JUDGMENT.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF OESTERGAARD, ADAM RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT TRINITY PROPERTIES DBA TRINITY MANAGEMENT SERVICES $2,187.12 PRINCIPAL, $105.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $2,292.12, DEFENDANT SHALL RECEIVE CREDIT AGAINST THIS JUDGMENT FOR ANY PREVIOUS REFUNDS TENDERED AND ACCEPTED BY PLAINTIFF. THE EVIDENCE WAS INSUFFICIENT TO ESTABLISH THAT THE WATER DAMAGE WAS ATTRIBUTABLE TO AN ACT OR OMISSION OF PLAINTIFF OR HIS ROOMMATE. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS PLAINTIFF'S AND DEFENDANT'S EXHIBITS RECEIVED
EXHIBITS RETURNED TO DEFENDANT TRINITY PROPERTIES DBA TRINITY MANAGEMENT SERVICES ADDITIONAL PLAINTIFF EXHIBITS
WRIT OF EXECUTION ISSUED TO SAN FRANCISCO COUNTY FILED BY PLAINTIFF OESTERGAARD, ADAM AS TO DEFENDANT TRINITY PROPERTIES DBA TRINITY MANAGEMENT SERVICES
WRIT RETURNED WRIT OF EXECUTION ISSUED TO SAN FRANCISCO COUNTY, RETURNED AND FILED, FULLY SATISFIED IN THE SUM OF $2,350.84 AS TO DEFENDANT TRINITY PROPERTIES DBA TRINITY MANAGEMENT SERVICES
EXHIBITS FROM EXHIBIT REPORT DATED JUN-01-2010 ORDERED DESTROYED
